meta.title: Streaming reconciliation + Streaming example page + example-payload seed shelf + region-less Card default
meta.author: planner (design seat)
meta.diff: v1 → v2 (same intake, item 4 folded in per team-lead dispatch after Kim's bare-Card diagnosis): ADDS n8 (ADR-0056 region-less-card ruling), n9 (card.css CSS fallback — component-builder, own browser/size gate), n10 (catalog SPEC §5.2 Card composition note) + actions a12/a13/a14. AMENDS accepts: n3a (+ seeds model the Card region idiom), n4 (+ the patterns-page 'composing containers' teaching block — same file/seat as the patterns migration), n7 (the no-components-touch assertion is scoped to the a2ui/site slices; n9 carries its own gate). v1 remains the pre-item-4 record.

nodes.label: Streaming SPEC/LLD v0.2 reconciliation (done in this intake)
nodes.accept: a2ui-streaming-pipeline.{spec,lld}.md at v0.2: zero `renderer heal.ts` citations remain (grep); the LLD component map carries a State column with all C1-C7 unbuilt + the realized-in-renderer boundary note; SPEC-R1 carries the healing-ownership sentence; all cross-references resolve

nodes.label: ADR-0055 (example seed shelf) PROPOSED → ratified
nodes.accept: adr_check.py exits 0; Status stays `proposed` until Kim rules forks F1/F2/F3; build slices dispatch only after acceptance

nodes.label: seed modules + ExampleSeed type + the "./examples" subpath export
nodes.accept: src/examples/{types,canvas-button,dynamic-lists,generative-form,patterns,index}.ts exist; 11 seeds exported (1 canvas + 4 lists + 1 form + 5 patterns); package.json exports gains "./examples" and the ROOT barrel does not re-export them (tree-shake: a root-barrel consumer bundles zero examples bytes); the form seed is the re-sliced fine-grained stream; EVERY Card in a seed composes region children (Card > CardContent/Header/Footer — the ADR-0056 pedagogy leg; a bare-children Card in a seed fails review)

nodes.label: the standing validity gate (src/examples/examples.test.ts)
nodes.accept: npm test runs it with zero vitest-config change: per seed, validateA2ui verdict valid AND a jsdom real-host smoke (mount → ingest each message as a JSONL line → finalize) emits zero error messages; a deliberately-broken local fixture (negative control, not exported) fails the gate

nodes.label: validate.ts callFunction-envelope widening (the MESSAGE_KINDS parity gap)
nodes.accept: validateA2ui accepts a spec-legal callFunction envelope (functionCallId string + callFunction.call string, no surfaceId) and still rejects a malformed one as SCHEMA; existing validate.test.ts stays green; dispatch/validator envelope sets are asserted equal by a parity probe

nodes.label: page migration (canvas · list · form · patterns import the seeds) + the patterns 'composing containers' block
nodes.accept: all four pages import @agent-ui/a2ui/examples and feed the SAME seed objects they display; no payload const remains in site/pages/*.ts except the canvas RPC literals; the patterns page carries the 'composing containers' teaching block (Card regions · Field wraps ONE control · Select > Option children — ADR-0056 leg 2); check:site green; pages behavior-identical in a hand browser pass

nodes.label: Streaming example page (site/a2ui-stream.html + pages/a2ui-stream.{ts,css})
nodes.accept: check green; demo 1 streams the SHARED generative-form seed line-by-line (payload pane grows with the feed, first-paint metric line k/N shown); demo 2 feeds a root-last PERMUTATION of the same seed objects (blank until root, then full paint); the labeled fault-injection affordance emits PARSE + the stream continues; Replay + Step controls, auto-run once, no loops; finalize fires at stream end with a clean log

nodes.label: site TOC entries (pages/_page.ts NAV + main.ts CARD_GROUPS)
nodes.accept: both renderings list the streaming page in the A2UI group; site-toc gate green; no dead hrefs

nodes.label: a2ui/site wave integration gate
nodes.accept: npm run check && npm test exit 0 at the integration commit; the examples gate is part of the run; the a2ui/site slices touch no components-package source (the ONLY components change this wave is the separately-gated n9 card slice)

nodes.label: ADR-0056 (region-less card humane default) PROPOSED → Kim rules the a/b/c/d fork
nodes.accept: adr_check.py exits 0; Status stays `proposed` until Kim rules; the recommendation on record is d+b (CSS fallback + pedagogy); n9/n10 dispatch only on acceptance

nodes.label: card.css region-less fallback (components package — component-builder seat, own gate)
nodes.accept: a bare-children ui-card renders region-equivalent padding + rhythm; adding any region child at runtime drops the fallback with no double padding (the :has() flip, browser-proven BOTH engines — jsdom cannot match :has()); a region-aware card is byte-identical to today (negative control); card > card direct nesting keeps the concentric-radius law; card.md documents the fallback + when real regions are REQUIRED; npm run check && npm test && test:browser green + size within budget

nodes.label: catalog SPEC §5.2 Card composition note
nodes.accept: the Card row states: children SHOULD be region sub-types; a region-less card renders with the ADR-0056 fallback; sticky header/footer + scrollable content REQUIRE real regions; the note cites ADR-0056; cross-references resolve

actions.label: reconcile the streaming docs to the realized tree (honest realized/unrealized boundary)
pin the seed-shelf home + gate as a ratifiable decision
own every example payload once, package-side, corpus-aligned
prove every seed valid + renderable at check time (close the runtime-only gap)
teach the shared validator every envelope the dispatcher routes
derive the four pages from the seeds (shown ≡ fed ≡ gated)
stream one payload incrementally with replay/step pacing
prove ordering tolerance and fault isolation live
surface progressive first paint as a visible metric
navigate to the streaming page from both TOC renderings
hold the wave green across type + behavior gates
pin the region-less-card ruling (fallback vs auto-wrap vs teach-only)
render a bare-children card humanely by default (wild-payload mercy)
teach the container-composition idiom to payload authors

edges.why: the seed shape, subpath policy, and RPC-stays-page-local rule are ADR-0055's ratified contract — the modules encode it
the gate iterates the exported seed set; it cannot exist before the seeds it validates
the pages import the seed modules — migration needs the exports to exist
the streaming page imports the SAME generative-form seed (single-owner reuse is the point)
check:site covers the migrated page modules at the integration commit
the integration gate includes the new examples test in npm test
TOC links must point at an existing page (dead-href guard)
the site-toc gate runs green only after both renderings are edited
the fallback leg implements the ratified ruling — a build against a proposed fork would pre-empt Kim
the SPEC note states the RATIFIED rule (fallback semantics + when regions are required); it cannot precede the ruling
